samples.query: Looking for a specialist to manage and secure our cloud infrastructure on AWS.
samples.positive: Manages information and systems security policy accounting for technical, human, organisational and other relevant threats. (Competency E.8)
samples.negative: Builds the required networks/network connections, components and interfaces. (Competency B.6)

samples.query: Develop a strategic plan for digital transformation of the company.
samples.positive: Provides strategic leadership for extensive interrelated programmes of work to ensure that Information Technology is a change enabling agent. (Competency E.7, Level 5)
samples.negative: Evaluates change requirements and exploits specialist skills to identify possible methods and standards that can be deployed. (Competency E.7, Level 3)
